title: libpng security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2:1.6.37-12.2]
- fix CVE-2026-25646: heap buffer overflow in png_set_quantize (RHEL-148970)
- fix CVE-2026-22695: heap buffer over-read in png_image_finish_read (RHEL-148403)
- fix CVE-2026-22801: heap buffer over-read in png_image_write_*bit (RHEL-147343)
full_text:
[2:1.6.37-12.2]
- fix CVE-2026-25646: heap buffer overflow in png_set_quantize (RHEL-148970)
- fix CVE-2026-22695: heap buffer over-read in png_image_finish_read (RHEL-148403)
- fix CVE-2026-22801: heap buffer over-read in png_image_write_*bit (RHEL-147343)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3405.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2026-22695.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2026-22801.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2026-25646.html
